title: Architect: floor max_files above 1 when tests are required
content: When requires_tests=true, max_files must be >= 3 (impl + test + one incidental). Floor it in _apply_conservative_tags in agents/coding_pipeline/architect.py and cover with tests.

title: Pipeline: scope build status to the epic and show Done leaves
content: meta build status should scope its Forge query to the epic ref prefix and include Done rows. Files: agents/coding_pipeline/main.py.
